assessment.note: He signaled a controllable-focus response to the promotion feedback, which suggests some clarity but also a growth stall around avoiding less controllable work.

new_queue.label: Unsaid reaction
new_queue.name: What did you choose not to say after that decision?
new_queue.description: Opens space for the unspoken reaction without naming the decision as a problem.

new_queue.label: Next-step picture
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?
new_queue.description: Gets at whether he sees a believable next move or only vague momentum.

new_queue.label: Mentoring shape
new_queue.name: What is the mentoring program taking space for in your week?
new_queue.description: Tests whether mentoring is healthy stretch or crowding out core product work.

new_queue.label: Core path tradeoff
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to spend time on because of the mentoring program?
new_queue.description: Forces the trade-off between stretch work and the core path he needs to build.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Ends by moving toward support and near-term stabilization without introducing a new thread.
